problem id: 82acc609
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(7)

examples:
  10000111 -> 01100001
  01001011 -> 01010010
  01101010 -> 10011010
  10001000 -> 00100010
  01111110 -> 10011111
  11010000 -> 00110100
  00000001 -> 11000000
  10000110 -> 10100001
  11001110 -> 10110011
  01011001 -> 11010110

query: 11101010
predicted answer: 10111010
